name: Magic Missile
description: A missile of magical energy darts forth and strikes at a creature.

name: Shield
description: An invisible barrier of magical force appears and protects you.

name: Mage Armor
description: A protective magical force surrounds the target.

name: Fireball
description: A bright streak flashes from your pointing finger to a point you choose, then blossoms with a low roar into an explosion.

name: Invisibility
description: A creature you touch becomes invisible until the spell ends.
